meta_title: For Freelancers: Git with AI to Solve stuck with basic apps (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Git with AI to Master Complex SaaS Apps
content.seo_description: Stop building basic apps. Learn to use Git with AI, Antigravity, and Claude Code to deliver high-end, complex software projects faster for your clients.
content.answer_block: Break through the 'basic app' ceiling by integrating Git-aware AI workflows. By pairing Antigravity’s structural intelligence with Claude Code’s CLI-based execution, you transform your codebase into a living, version-controlled architecture. This approach automates boilerplate and logic complexity, allowing you to ship professional-grade SaaS features in a fraction of the time.
content.intro:
You’ve hit the wall. Your client projects are stuck in the 'basic app' loop—CRUD interfaces and simple state management that leave your portfolio looking amateur. The gap between a hobbyist and a high-ticket freelancer isn't just code; it's the ability to manage complexity at speed without losing your mind in technical debt.

True velocity comes from treating your repository as a collaborative partner. By mastering the intersection of Git, Antigravity, and Claude Code, you stop fighting your IDE and start orchestrating sophisticated, enterprise-ready features. It is time to evolve your workflow from manual labor to AI-assisted engineering.

steps.title: Architectural Blueprinting with Antigravity
steps.description: Before writing code, use Antigravity to define your project's domain model and data relationships to ensure scalability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the business requirements for a multi-tenant SaaS dashboard. Generate a clean, normalized schema and directory structure that supports high-concurrency database operations.

steps.title: Contextual AI Initialization
steps.description: Use Claude Code to read your existing codebase context so it understands your custom architectural patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current directory structure and ensure all new modules follow the established dependency injection pattern.

steps.title: Iterative Feature Implementation
steps.description: Break complex features into atomic tasks and execute them using Claude Code to ensure clean, isolated commits.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a secure, role-based access control middleware that integrates with our current authentication stack.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement RBAC middleware in src/middleware/auth.ts'

steps.title: Automated Refactoring & Optimization
steps.description: Leverage AI to scan for performance bottlenecks and execute refactoring across multiple files simultaneously.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current API response times and suggest refactors to reduce database query overhead in the user profile module.

steps.title: Version-Controlled Quality Assurance
steps.description: Finalize features by generating unit tests and documentation before merging into the main branch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive test suite for the new auth middleware, covering edge cases and security vulnerabilities.

pro_tips: Always commit after every successful Claude Code block to create a granular, reversible history.
Use Antigravity to generate 'ADR' files (Architecture Decision Records) to impress clients with your technical documentation.
Configure your .claudeignore file to exclude build artifacts and heavy assets to keep the AI context window focused on logic.
When stuck, run 'claude explain' on your own code to see if the AI identifies the same bugs you are manually hunting.
Treat your Git commit messages as logs for your AI; use structured prefixes like 'feat-ai:', 'fix-ai:', and 'refactor-ai:'.
resources: Git Best Practices for AI Workflows: https://git-scm.com/book
content.next_steps: Audit your current project using these tools, identify one manual process you perform daily, and automate it with a custom Claude Code script.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your skills plateau and start shipping software that demands premium rates. The difference between a struggling freelancer and an elite AI Builder is the quality of the tools they master today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
